# Expressive State
> Class-based reactive state management for React, Preact, and Solid.

## Docs
- [Core API](/llms/core.md): State class, reactivity, get/set, lifecycle, events
- [React Adapter](/llms/react.md): State.use(), .get(), .as(), Provider, JSX
- [Instructions](/llms/instructions.md): apply, ref, get, set
- [Patterns](/llms/patterns.md): Common recipes and examples
- [Lifecycle & Internals](/llms/lifecycle.md): Lifecycle phases, teardown, error handling
- [TypeScript](/llms/typescript.md): Type system, generics, instruction overloads
- [Testing](/llms/testing.md): Vitest setup, matchers, React testing patterns
- [Adapters](/llms/adapters.md): React, Preact, Solid comparison and performance
- [Bootstrap](/llms/bootstrap.md): Drop-in snippet for consumer projects
